pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh script which sets PROJECT_DIR and creates the folder.
Checked verifier.py which explicitly requires rmse < 1.0 for a full score.
Code analysis of ekf.py and test suite confirm exactly 3 logical bugs (marked in comments) that cause tests to fail.

metadata_value: Prediction step ignores dt in position integration
GPS measurement matrix H maps to wrong state indices
Covariance update uses addition instead of subtraction
verified_value: Prediction step ignores dt in position integration
GPS measurement matrix H maps to wrong state indices
Covariance update uses addition instead of subtraction
pi_items.source: Code analysis of setup_task.sh generated ekf.py confirms these exact bugs are present.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic flight data generated during setup. The project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/drone_estimator. The target Position RMSE for full score is < 1.0m, explicitly checked by verifier.py. There are exactly 3 logical bugs in the EKF implementation: a missing dt multiplier in the position prediction step, the H matrix mapping to velocity instead of position, and an incorrect addition sign in the covariance update equation. All metadata claims are correct.
